name: Uizard
description: Uizard — AI-powered UI design tool that converts sketches and screenshots to editable wireframes and prototypes.

seo.title: Uizard — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Uizard: Uizard — AI-powered UI design tool that converts sketches and screenshots to editable wireframes and prototypes.

when_to_use: Generating UI mockups and wireframes from text descriptions
Transforming hand-drawn sketches into digital prototypes with AI
Rapidly prototyping app screens for user testing sessions
Converting design screenshots into editable components

pros: Sketch and screenshot to wireframe fast
Good starting point for PM mockups
cons: Output still needs heavy design polish
Being outpaced by v0 and Figma AI
review.verdict: Handy ideation tool for PMs and founders, but serious designers have better options today.
review.best_for: PMs and founders sketching app concepts before bringing in designers
review.not_for: Design teams already working in Figma who want production-grade components
